title: Neviti Christmas Craft Rudolph Glass Decorations - Pack of 10
features: Co-ordinates with the other items in the Christmas Craft collection
description: Product Description Add a fun touch to your glassware this Christmas with these decorations, inspired by Santa special helper. Part of our Christmas craft range, these rudolph-shaped glass decorations are suitable for use with tumblers, flutes and other glasses, and add a pop of seasonal colour to your table. Use alone or combine with other pieces in the range for a colourful and cohesive scheme. Box Contains 10 x Glass decorations - Rudolph
